summary: Recorded a 10-second walkthrough of the marketing site (hero → pricing → safety) with caption overlays and embedded it on a new /watch page + /how-it-works.

scenes: Home hero — caption: 'Inklings — a storybook your child stars in'
Pricing page — caption: 'Free to start. $9.99 Premium. $19.99 per printed book.'
Safety page — caption: 'Safety is the first feature. Parent approval gate. COPPA-compliant.'
video.caption_styling_per_spine: rgba(74,37,69,0.92) bg, cream text, 22px font, mint border, z-index 2147483647

added: scripts/record_walkthrough.cjs (Playwright recorder, runs against any Inklings URL via npm run walkthrough:record)

scope_note: Marketing-only walkthrough (no portal/studio). Studio + portal recordings need authenticated sessions on prod data — defer to a future dispatch when there's seeded prod data the parent has explicitly approved.
rerun_command: npm run walkthrough:record (defaults to https://inklings.shop) or node scripts/record_walkthrough.cjs http://localhost:3400 for local
